message:
fix(operators): fix null-safety and division-by-zero bugs in ScaleCheckSession

- Remove unused Button import
- Add null guards to all event handlers to prevent crashes when
  component state is not yet initialized
- Guard against division by zero in r-to-d conversion when |r| >= 1
- All fixes prevent potential runtime crashes during edge cases

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -255,7 +255,7 @@ function ResultButton({ inconclusive: { icon: HelpCircle, label: "Inconclusive", - description: "Doesn't clearly match either", + description: "Doesn't clearly match either", color: "text-amber-500", bgColor: "bg-amber-500/10", borderColor: "border-amber-500", @@ -883,11 +883,15 @@ export function EvidenceRecorder({
Test: -

{state.test?.description.slice(0, 50)}...

+

+ {state.test ? `${state.test.description.slice(0, 50)}...` : "No test selected"} +

Power: -

{state.test && getStarRating(state.test.discriminativePower)}

+

+ {state.test ? getStarRating(state.test.discriminativePower) : "N/A"} +
